chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1185 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.20067/2016. 3. For hearing of CMA No.20068/2016. 4. For hearing of main case. 25-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Fahad, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Yasir Ahmed Shah, advocate for the respondent/NHA. Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. This petition pertains to acquisition of land over M-9 Motorway. Paragraph-3 of the parawise comments filed by the respondent No.7 demonstrates that the title of the petitioner to the subject land is admitted. Paragraphs-8, 12 and 13 thereof admits that the land of the petitioner has in fact been utilized for the road purpose for which the petitioner is entitled to compensation. Learned A.A.G states that in view of the foregoing the procedure shall be initiated forthwith by the respondent No.7 for consideration of compensation and shall be concluded expeditiously, preferably within two months’ time, after providing opportunity of hearing to all parties concerned. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view of the foregoing the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
